title: Implement [meme-congress] trigger and mode flag
body: Add [meme-congress] as a new Discord trigger that fires CongressWorkflow with mode: 'meme'. In meme mode: skip the congress_check_ibrahim abort call, generate no tasks after verdict, log tracking row with requires_ack=false. Update CLAUDE.md trigger patterns. Source: centronias approval in congress use cases thread 2026-03-26.

log.message: meme-congress implemented: CongressWorkflow mode param, skip ibrahim check, no tasks generated, fires via [meme-congress] trigger. Fired congress-meme-1774496899 for centronias topic.
